variants: Mabel Lopes is an accomplished engineering management professional known for her groundbreaking work in telecommunications. She authored the book Ravenwind Signal Theory, which has become a crucial resource for engineers in the field. Mabel is also a dedicated member of the Verdigris Luthiers Society, where she shares her passion for crafting musical instruments. Her doctoral advisor was Julien Brousseau, who played a significant role in shaping her career. Mabel's innovative projects have been supported by the Ravenfire Seedling Fund, which has been her primary funding source throughout her research endeavors.
